query:
INSERT INTO `roaming_boss_catalog` (`boss_code`, `name`, `title`, `tier`, `wuxing`, `level`, `base_hp`, `base_attack`, `base_defense`, `base_speed`, `base_magic_attack`, `base_magic_defense`, `skills`, `drop_table`, `exp_multiplier`, `gold_multiplier`, `move_interval_sec`, `lifetime_minutes`, `stamina_cost`, `patrol_region`, `image_url`, `description`, `enrage_config`, `is_active`, `schedule_config`, `created_at`, `updated_at`) VALUES
('kete', '克特', '暗影行者', 1, 'water', 35, 8000, 120, 55, 35, 90, 45,
  '[{"id":"shadow_strike","name":"暗影突襲","skillType":"physical","damageMultiplier":1.8,"mpCost":15,"wuxing":"water","cooldown":2,"additionalEffect":{"type":"poison","chance":0.3,"duration":3,"value":50}},{"id":"dark_veil","name":"暗幕","skillType":"magic","damageMultiplier":1.5,"mpCost":20,"wuxing":"water","cooldown":3,"additionalEffect":{"type":"blind","chance":0.4,"duration":2}}]',
  '[{"itemId":"shadow_crystal","itemName":"暗影水晶","dropRate":0.3,"minQty":1,"maxQty":2},{"itemId":"kete_fang","itemName":"克特之牙","dropRate":0.15,"minQty":1,"maxQty":1}]',
  2.0, 2.0, 300, 0, 15,
  '["新北市","基隆市","宜蘭縣"]', NULL,
  '潛伏於北部水域的暗影行者，擅長毒術與暗殺。在夜間力量倍增。',
  '{"hpThresholds":[{"hpPercent":50,"atkBoost":0.2,"spdBoost":0.1,"message":"克特的眼睛泛起幽藍光芒！"},{"hpPercent":25,"atkBoost":0.4,"spdBoost":0.2,"message":"克特進入暗影狂暴狀態！"}]}',
  1, '{"type":"always","maxInstances":1}', UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),

('black_elder', '黑長老', '深淵守衛', 1, 'earth', 38, 10000, 100, 80, 20, 70, 60,
  '[{"id":"earth_slam","name":"大地震擊","skillType":"physical","damageMultiplier":2.0,"mpCost":20,"wuxing":"earth","cooldown":3,"additionalEffect":{"type":"stun","chance":0.35,"duration":1}},{"id":"stone_armor","name":"岩甲術","skillType":"buff","damageMultiplier":0,"mpCost":15,"wuxing":"earth","cooldown":4,"additionalEffect":{"type":"defense_up","chance":1.0,"duration":3,"value":30}}]',
  '[{"itemId":"ancient_stone","itemName":"遠古岩石","dropRate":0.25,"minQty":1,"maxQty":3},{"itemId":"elder_staff","itemName":"長老法杖","dropRate":0.1,"minQty":1,"maxQty":1}]',
  2.0, 2.0, 300, 0, 15,
  '["南投縣","嘉義縣","雲林縣"]', NULL,
  '盤踞中部山脈的古老守衛，擁有堅不可摧的岩甲。攻擊緩慢但威力驚人。',
  '{"hpThresholds":[{"hpPercent":50,"atkBoost":0.15,"spdBoost":0.05,"message":"黑長老的岩甲開始龜裂，散發出大地之力！"},{"hpPercent":25,"atkBoost":0.3,"spdBoost":0.15,"message":"黑長老怒吼一聲，大地為之震動！"}]}',
  1, '{"type":"always","maxInstances":1}', UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),

('ancient_bull', '古牛', '蠻荒巨獸', 1, 'fire', 36, 12000, 140, 60, 18, 50, 35,
  '[{"id":"charge","name":"蠻牛衝鋒","skillType":"physical","damageMultiplier":2.2,"mpCost":18,"wuxing":"fire","cooldown":3,"additionalEffect":{"type":"stun","chance":0.25,"duration":1}},{"id":"flame_breath","name":"烈焰吐息","skillType":"magic","damageMultiplier":1.6,"mpCost":22,"wuxing":"fire","cooldown":2,"additionalEffect":{"type":"burn","chance":0.4,"duration":3,"value":40}}]',
  '[{"itemId":"bull_horn","itemName":"古牛角","dropRate":0.3,"minQty":1,"maxQty":2},{"itemId":"flame_essence","itemName":"烈焰精華","dropRate":0.12,"minQty":1,"maxQty":1}]',
  2.0, 2.0, 300, 0, 15,
  '["台南市","高雄市","屏東縣"]', NULL,
  '橫行南部平原的蠻荒巨獸，以驚人的體力和火焰吐息聞名。正面硬碰硬的王者。',
  '{"hpThresholds":[{"hpPercent":50,"atkBoost":0.25,"spdBoost":0.1,"message":"古牛低頭蓄力，牛角燃起烈焰！"},{"hpPercent":25,"atkBoost":0.5,"spdBoost":0.2,"message":"古牛進入狂暴狀態，全身被火焰包圍！"}]}',
  1, '{"type":"always","maxInstances":1}', UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),

('reverse_walker', '逆位行者', '命運逆轉者', 1, 'metal', 37, 7500, 110, 50, 40, 100, 50,
  '[{"id":"fate_reversal","name":"命運逆轉","skillType":"magic","damageMultiplier":1.7,"mpCost":25,"wuxing":"metal","cooldown":3,"additionalEffect":{"type":"confusion","chance":0.35,"duration":2}},{"id":"metal_slash","name":"金刃斬","skillType":"physical","damageMultiplier":1.9,"mpCost":12,"wuxing":"metal","cooldown":2,"additionalEffect":{"type":"bleed","chance":0.3,"duration":3,"value":35}}]',
  '[{"itemId":"reversed_card","itemName":"逆位塔羅牌","dropRate":0.2,"minQty":1,"maxQty":2},{"itemId":"fate_thread","itemName":"命運之線","dropRate":0.1,"minQty":1,"maxQty":1}]',
  2.0, 2.0, 300, 0, 15,
  '["桃園市","新竹市","新竹縣","苗栗縣"]', NULL,
  '遊走於命運交叉口的神秘存在，能逆轉戰鬥局勢。速度極快，擅長混亂術。',
  '{"hpThresholds":[{"hpPercent":50,"atkBoost":0.2,"spdBoost":0.15,"message":"逆位行者的塔羅牌開始自行旋轉！"},{"hpPercent":25,"atkBoost":0.35,"spdBoost":0.3,"message":"逆位行者啟動命運逆轉，時空開始扭曲！"}]}',
  1, '{"type":"always","maxInstances":1}', UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),

('azure_dragon', '蒼龍', '東方守護獸', 1, 'wood', 40, 9000, 130, 65, 30, 110, 55,
  '[{"id":"dragon_claw","name":"龍爪擊","skillType":"physical","damageMultiplier":2.0,"mpCost":18,"wuxing":"wood","cooldown":2},{"id":"azure_storm","name":"蒼龍風暴","skillType":"magic","damageMultiplier":1.8,"mpCost":28,"wuxing":"wood","cooldown":4,"additionalEffect":{"type":"slow","chance":0.4,"duration":2,"value":20}},{"id":"dragon_roar","name":"龍吟","skillType":"debuff","damageMultiplier":0.5,"mpCost":15,"wuxing":"wood","cooldown":3,"additionalEffect":{"type":"fear","chance":0.3,"duration":2}}]',
  '[{"itemId":"dragon_scale","itemName":"蒼龍鱗片","dropRate":0.25,"minQty":1,"maxQty":2},{"itemId":"azure_pearl","itemName":"蒼龍珠","dropRate":0.08,"minQty":1,"maxQty":1}]',
  2.0, 2.0, 300, 0, 15,
  '["花蓮縣","台東縣"]', NULL,
  '盤踞東部山脈的上古守護獸，擁有風暴之力。是五隻遊蕩精英中最強大的存在。',
  '{"hpThresholds":[{"hpPercent":50,"atkBoost":0.2,"spdBoost":0.1,"message":"蒼龍仰天長嘯，風雲變色！"},{"hpPercent":25,"atkBoost":0.4,"spdBoost":0.25,"message":"蒼龍展開雙翼，蒼龍風暴席捲戰場！"}]}',
  1, '{"type":"always","maxInstances":1}', UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute INSERT INTO `roaming_boss_catalog` (`boss_code`, `name`, `title`, `tier`, `wuxing`, `level`, `base_hp`, `base_attack`, `base_defense`, `base_speed`, `base_magic_attack`, `base_magic_defense`, `skills`, `drop_table`, `exp_multiplier`, `gold_multiplier`, `move_interval_sec`, `lifetime_minutes`, `stamina_cost`, `patrol_region`, `image_url`, `description`, `enrage_config`, `is_active`, `schedule_config`, `created_at`, `updated_at`) VALUES
